name: Renegade

backlog.reason: Foundational belt-scrolling beat-'em-up that directly influenced Double Dragon and the genre as a whole.

acquisition.reason: Historically critical origin point for the Kunio-kun lineage and early beat-'em-up design.
acquisition.notes: Contained in Double Dragon & Kunio-kun: Retro Brawler Bundle.

notes: Westernized version of Nekketsu Kōha Kunio-kun.
description: Westernized version of Kunio’s original brawler, focused on street fights against gangs.
